dsVertClient 1.1.0
    • Overview
    • Generalised linear models
    • GLM (binomial, K=3)
  • Reference

K>=3 Ring63 DCF + Beaver Gradient Loop

Source: R/ds.vertGLM.k3ring63.R
k3-ring63-dcf-loop.Rd

Pure Ring63 protocol for K>=3 binomial/Poisson GLM. Uses additive secret sharing of features to 2 DCF parties, DCF wide spline for sigmoid/exp, and Beaver matvec for gradient. Pure Ring63 additive secret sharing.

Details

Protocol:

  1. One-time: all servers share features+y with 2 DCF parties (Ring63 FP)

  2. Per iteration: DCF parties compute eta from X_share*beta

  3. DCF wide spline between DCF parties -> mu shares

  4. Beaver matvec between DCF parties -> gradient shares

  5. Client aggregates Ring63 shares -> plaintext gradient

  6. Client L-BFGS update

Requires: transport keys only. No CPK, Galois, or RLK. Precision: ~1e-3 (DCF approximation).

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
